codeReview.summary: The worker correctly identified that the MonthEndChecklistPage.tsx implementation was already complete and only needed expanded test coverage. Added 6 new interaction tests covering toggle payloads, progress recomputation, readiness gating, badge updates, and uncheck behavior. All 14 tests pass, meeting VAL-ACCT-006 requirements for manual confirmation persistence, visible progress recomputation, and close-readiness gating.

issues.description: Some tests emit act() warnings from React Testing Library during initial render. Tests pass but could be improved by wrapping initial data fetching in act() or using findBy* queries more consistently. This is a minor testing hygiene issue that doesn't affect test reliability.

The test 'close button stays blocked after partial manual toggles' verifies blocking but doesn't actually click the toggle to simulate real user flow - it mocks the checklist as already partially complete. Consider adding a test that starts with mockChecklist, toggles one item, and verifies the button remains disabled.

summary: Feature passes review. The worker added comprehensive test coverage for the month-end checklist toggle, progress, and readiness gating behaviors required by VAL-ACCT-006. The existing MonthEndChecklistPage.tsx implementation was already correct - worker correctly recognized no code changes were needed. Tests verify: (1) manual toggle calls updateChecklist with correct payload for both bankReconciled and inventoryCounted, (2) progress recomputes from '2 of 5' to '3 of 5' after toggle, (3) Close Period button stays disabled when readyToClose=false despite partial progress, (4) Confirmed badge appears after toggle, (5) unchecking sends checked=false. Minor test hygiene issues noted but non-blocking.
